_readme: External example — POST /query with no session_id (optional field omitted). The spec marks session_id as optional. This external example tests that the server defaults correctly to the 'default' session without throwing a KeyError or returning a 422. Impossible to express as an inline named example because the request and response names must match — here we just need the request to omit a field.

body.query: How many drones were serviced this month?

body.answer: 12 drones were serviced this month based on the Work Orders board.
